name: Superhero Sim
description:
Ever wondered what it would be like to be a heroine? That too a super heroine? Well you are in luck. In a Whoratia, You are a Superheroine. But being a heroine comes with a price.

The people of the city, Whoratia, has a huge kink to see their heroine fucked and humiliated. See, As Whoratia sees Superheroes in a dim light, because, in crime ridden city, stopping the crimes means potentially destroying someone's livelihood.

So when a heroine saves some from a gang, it’s common that the next day she is found in an alley way with cock lodged in her throat and probably kidnaped to be trained into a sex performer and sold to the highest bidder.

So being so powerful, that regular people putting you in your place turns you on? Well Then you have come to the right place. Humiliation is a huge part of the theme, because, when heroines have reputation, humiliation is what really hurts them and forces them into corners.

TRIGGER WARNING:
HEAVY CNC, HUMILIATION, FURNITURE.....
